emails.subject: RE: FW: Patina Oil & Gas Docs.
emails.body: RE: FW: Patina Oil Gas Docs. Shark-- I see you referenced Fort Union below, therefore these e-mails to Chris are concerning a well in the Powder River?

emails.subject: RE: FW: Patina Oil & Gas Docs.
emails.body: No I am delerious because I am too poor to eat. It should be Lost Creek.

emails.subject: RE: FW: Patina Oil & Gas Docs.
emails.body: After speaking with you and learning that ENE was down to $20/share, I had a family meeting last night when I got home. Kim needs to pull in more income any way possible; The kids need to get after pre-school jobs; etc. Quote of the day..."Are you guys on crack?"

emails.subject: RE: FW: Patina Oil & Gas Docs.
emails.body: I told Alicia that she and the kids are eating way too much! She told me that her Oils business is really taking off! I think she may need to start turning tricks!
